gamerule.ladderspeed.climbSpeed.descript: Percentage multiplier for vertical climb speed on ladders. (100 = 1.0x)
gamerule.ladderspeed.sprintMultiplier.de: Percentage multiplier for ladder climb speed while sprinting. (150 = 1.5x)
gamerule.ladderspeed.descendSpeed.descri: Percentage multiplier for sliding down ladders. (100 = 1.0x)
gamerule.ladderspeed.snapDescend.descrip: When enabled, looking down while on a ladder will significantly speed up descent.
